parsed_review.summary: CP00-689 is a descriptor-only RP22 External Integrations I P08 bridge pack (risk B, 40 units, RP22.P08.M04.S13-RP22.P08.M06.S08) and its evidence is sound, internally consistent, and within all declared boundaries. Verified via Read/Grep/Glob only: (1) Baseline distribution matches across prompt, review-baseline, both contract files, registry, service, validators, and manifest — deliverables {implementation:18, hermes_evidence:19, test:2, claude_review:1}; micro-titles {Secondary Workflow Slice:10, Permission And Audit Binding:22, Synthetic Fixture Set:8}; phase RP22.P08:40; first/last unit and 40-unit count align. (2) Implementation: EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS_I_CP689_PACK_BINDING/_REQUIREMENTS are frozen and match the contract; createExternalIntegrationsICp689* descriptor/hermes/claude/handoff functions emit descriptor-only output with every runtime flag false (workflow/permission/audit/fixture/persistence/command/hermes/claude/ui all closed); freezeCp689Result is pure. (3) validators.js validateExternalIntegrationsICp689P08WorkflowPermissionFixtureBridgeDescriptor and validateExternalIntegrationsICp689Coverage enforce descriptor-only, no runtime, no raw payload, RP22-only units, distribution parity, and Claude-not-final; the contract-projection validator chains the CP689 check. (4) model.test.js asserts descriptor validity, runtime-closed flags, hermes runtime_receipt_emitted=false, claude read_only=true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, handoff to CP00-690/RP22.P08.M06.S09, and that both contract files match the projection and the no-write attestation equals the shared CP666 constant. (5) command-evidence shows 22/22 commands at exit_code 0, covering node --check on all sources, closeout-pack[-plan] generate/validate, rp22/weighted/spec/fullplan/global/goal/rp00 validators, node --test, npm test, build, and git diff --check, with writes_product_state=false and no_real_data=true. (6) No-write/no-real-data: cp689_no_write_attestation is comprehensive (no token/secret persistence, no provider calls, no cross-tenant, customer_safe_errors_only, leak_detected=false); no secret/token literals found in the contract; entity_shapes reference secret-storage fields only as descriptors, not values. (7) Authority boundary honored: Claude is read_only_independent_reviewer and not final approver; authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false and local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false; human final approval and enterprise-trust closure sit outside this receipt; Hermes is deterministic packet/receipt only (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false). (8) Live next-pack-queue confirms CP00-689 is the live latest pack with next unit RP22.P08.M06.S09. The pending_review status in adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, and claude-review-result.json (production_ready=false, exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false) is the expected pre-receipt bootstrap of the hardened sequence (baseline -> readiness -> this read-only run -> normalize -> receipt -> adjudicate), not an over-claim; the pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim. No auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced/prose, tool-call-shaped, or missing-field review evidence is relied upon (readiness auth-preflight passed cleanly; no prior invalid attempts in scope). No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects identified; the descriptor-verified production_ready gate is supported without being weakened.
